title: ORDER BY DESC + LIMIT incorrectly yields empty result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sensors (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP, value FLOAT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO sensors (id, timestamp, value) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:00:00', 23.5);
INSERT INTO sensors (id, timestamp, value) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:05:00', 19.0);
SELECT id, value FROM sensors WHERE timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 09:00:00' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, value FROM sensors WHERE timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:10:00' AND timestamp <= TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:15:00' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY DESC with LIMIT on empty result set
